name: @pm-os/desktop
description: PMOS — VS Code-style desktop app for project managers with embedded SaaS panels, terminal, and Open VSX extension marketplace.
author: Coruh Durmus <coruh.d@gmail.com>

scripts.build:css: cat src/renderer/styles/variables.css src/renderer/styles/reset.css src/renderer/styles/layout.css src/renderer/sidebar/sidebar.css src/renderer/panels/panels.css src/renderer/command-palette/command-palette.css src/renderer/terminal/terminal.css src/renderer/notification-center/notification-center.css src/renderer/onboarding/onboarding.css src/renderer/browser-sidebar/browser-sidebar.css src/renderer/internal-panels/extension-store-panel.css src/renderer/internal-panels/file-viewer-panel.css > dist/renderer/styles.css
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/renderer && pnpm build:main && pnpm build:preload && pnpm build:renderer && pnpm build:css && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css dist/renderer/xterm.css && cp node_modules/@vscode/codicons/dist/codicon.css dist/renderer/codicon.css && cp node_modules/@vscode/codicons/dist/codicon.ttf dist/renderer/codicon.ttf && cp ../../logo-dark.svg dist/renderer/logo-dark.svg && cp ../../logo-light.svg dist/renderer/logo-light.svg
scripts.package:mac: pnpm build && pnpm rebuild:native && bash scripts/package-mac.sh
